name: Tuna Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Roasted red pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
(jarred ones are fine)
Tuna
Scallions OR shallots - finely chopped;
Celery - finely chopped
Make homemade mayonnaise by combining the egg yolks, 1 tablespoon oil, lemon juice, salt/pepper, and mustard in a bowl. Process until an emulsion forms. Add the remaining oil almost drop by drop while the machine is running until all is incorporated and the mixture becomes thick.
Mash the red peppers finely and stir into the mayonnaise until fully mixed.
Taste and adjust seasoning as desired. Mix in the chopped scallions or shallots, celery (if using), and curry (if desired) before combining with the tuna salad.
